description: arXiv:2601.20174v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Solving large-scale sparse linear systems originating from partial differential equations (PDEs) is a fundamental topic in high-performance scientific computing, where preconditioners are crucial. Multigrid methods are among the most effective preconditioners, yet their performance is dictated by the accurate construction of grid transfe...
author: Alexander Benanti, Xi Han, Hong Qin
